mapper.select:
SELECT com_grp_cd_seq ,com_grp_cd ,com_grp_cd_nm ,com_grp_cd_desc ,ref01 ,ref02 ,ref03 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,created_by ,updated_by ,created_at::timestamp AS created_at ,updated_at::timestamp AS updated_at FROM event.com_grp_cd WHERE 1=1
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
AND ( upper(com_grp_cd) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchText}) || '%' OR upper(com_grp_cd_nm) LIKE '%' || upper(#{searchText}) || '%' )
ORDER BY sort_seq, com_grp_cd
